content_summary: Created comprehensive 300+ line documentation covering the complete meeting ingestion pipeline. Includes overview of Drive→Transcript→Blocks→CRM flow, environment variables table, detailed Google Drive setup instructions, complete block type reference (B01-B27 external, B40-B48 internal), state management with folder suffixes, usage examples, and extensive troubleshooting section. Documentation follows standard format with YAML frontmatter and structured sections.
